enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Suttrum Boomi Mele expresses the feelings of love and the beauty of nature, intertwining emotions with vivid imagery.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Idhu Enna Maayam, this song plays during a romantic moment, highlighting the protagonist's feelings and connection with their love interest.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by Shireen Shahana, known for her soulful voice and emotional delivery.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Suttrum Boomi Mele was composed by GV Prakash Kumar, who is renowned for his innovative musical style.

When was this song released?

The song was released on October 30, 2015, as part of the movie's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Suttrum Boomi Mele, the protagonist expresses their deep emotions and connection to love through poetic lyrics and a soothing melody. The song beautifully encapsulates the essence of romance, making it a perfect backdrop for intimate moments in Idhu Enna Maayam. With Shireen Shahana's enchanting voice and GV Prakash Kumar's melodic composition, it evokes feelings of nostalgia and warmth. This track is not just a song but an experience that resonates with anyone who has ever been in love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting vibes of Suttrum Boomi Mele from the movie Idhu Enna Maayam, where Shireen Shahana's mesmerizing vocals blend seamlessly with GV Prakash Kumar's captivating composition. This song beautifully captures the essence of romance and the magic of love, making it a must-listen for all music lovers. Dive into a world of melodies that evoke deep emotions and unforgettable moments.
stanzaMeanings: I am like a spark, I am like lightning, I am like rain, I am like a cloud.
I am like a dew drop, I am like flowers, I am like a butterfly.
Who am I? If I say it, will you understand? I will bring the breeze, I will give you music.
Woa woaho woaho whoo woa Woa woaho woaho whoo woa
On this spinning earth, I am the wandering soul, I will exist everywhere in the moonlight.
The tiger's mark is not in my life, I will fly and wander everywhere.
Oh child, girl, both together, that is my identity.
Oh wind, when you go, you take my heart with you.
When I say my name, who will know? I am the one who creates illusions.
Woa woaho woaho whoo woa Woa woaho woaho whoo woa
On this spinning earth, I am the wandering soul, I will exist everywhere in the moonlight.
The tiger's mark is not in my life, I will fly and wander everywhere.
When I see this and that, my eyes will shine.
Like a path that leads to a battle, my heart will tremble.
When I walk on the street, it will immediately become lively.
The heart of a woman wants everything, just like me.
On this spinning earth, I am the wandering soul, I will exist everywhere in the moonlight.
The tiger's mark is not in my life, I will fly and wander everywhere.
I looked at the good direction, will the cloud rain?
I asked what this place is, will music come?
In the path of youth, what is the obstacle? Oh mind, let it go.
Like a river without a bank, let’s walk together.
On this spinning earth, I am the wandering soul, I will exist everywhere in the moonlight.
The tiger's mark is not in my life, I will fly and wander everywhere.
Oh child, girl, both together, that is my identity.
Oh wind, when you go, you take my heart with you.
When I say my name, who will know? I am the one who creates illusions.
